title: No Item Bounce
description: This mod disables item drop scatter by centering items on the block grid.
body:
![No Item Bounce](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/358867ffa89db4bbdb02a527a990b10a549dcfcc.gif) Tired of items flying everywhere when you break blocks? This mod centers all item drops on the block you break, eliminating randomness and making item collection predictable and reliable.
FEATURES
Centered Item DropsItems spawn at the exact position of the block or entity that dropped them. No random horizontal scatter, items stay put
Entity Death Drop CenteringItems dropped from dying mobs and players spawn at the entity's exact position instead of scattering randomly
Shearing Drop CenteringItems dropped from shearing sheep, mooshrooms, snow golems, and bogged spawn at the mob's exact position
Storage Block Item CenteringItems dropped from storage blocks such as chests, barrels, and furnaces spawn perfectly centered on the block
Preserved AnimationsItems still float and bob normally after spawning. Only the initial spawn position and velocity are affected
HOW TO USE
- Break any block. Items will spawn at the block's position instead of scattering randomly. - Kill any mob or player, or shear a mob. Dropped items will stay at the entity's position instead of spreading out. - Enjoy predictable drops! No more chasing items into lava or off cliffs.
CONFIGURATION
Open Mod Menu in-game to access the settings screen:
Vertical BounceEnabledKeep vanilla upward bounce while maintaining centered X/Z position
DisabledItems spawn at floor level with no bounce
REQUIREMENTS
* Fabric Loader * Fabric API * Cloth Config API (1.21.x) * YetAnotherConfigLib (26.x) * Mod Menu (recommended for easy in-game configuration)
CLIENT & SERVER
Some functionality exists on both the client and the server, making the mod required for the server but optional for the client.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: * Leaving a rating/review * Sharing it with friends * Reporting any bugs you find
GALLERY
Vertical Bounce: Disabled ![Remove Vertical Bounce: ON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a010d8d53948979a98daeb9d5a856e876c64b09.gif) Vertical Bounce: Enabled ![Remove Vertical Bounce: OFF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/512f90497f522d5f9732291de4829c59f66aba73.gif)
